descriptions.text: 2000 racing video game published by Infogrames
Looney Tunes Racing is a kart racing video game released for the PlayStation and Game Boy Color and published by Infogrames. It was released in 2000 in North America and in 2001 in Europe.

Looney Tunes Racing est un jeu vidéo de course sorti en 2000 sur Game Boy Color et en 2001 sur PlayStation. Le jeu a été développé par Circus Freak Studios (PlayStation) et Xantera (Game Boy Color), et édité par Infogrames.
Looney Tunes Racing è un videogioco di guida basato sui personaggi dei cartoni animati Looney Tunes, pubblicato nel 2000 per PlayStation e Game Boy Color da Infogrames.
